headline: United Rentals AI Push With ChatGPT Agent And Valuation Context For Investors
summary: United Rentals (NYSE:URI) has expanded its AI-powered Equipment Agent to the ChatGPT platform. This marks the first equipment rental application in the ChatGPT store, giving customers a new digital channel to request equipment solutions. The company aims to improve speed, usability, jobsite productivity, and safety through this AI integration. United Rentals, a major equipment rental company serving construction, industrial, and infrastructure customers, is tying its core rental offering...
